## What Are You Improving?

- [ ] A board member persona (which one? ______________)
- [ ] A report template (which one? __________________)
- [ ] The Chairman's instructions
- [ ] The SKILL.md protocol logic
- [ ] Something else: ___________________________

## What Is the Current Limitation?

<!-- What does the current content do (or fail to do) that prompted this? Be 
specific — quote the relevant section if possible. -->

## What Do You Propose?

<!-- Describe your proposed improvement. If it's a change to a persona's 
philosophy or vigilance checklist, explain the reasoning. If it's a correction 
to inaccurate content, cite the source. -->

## Evidence or Justification

<!-- For persona changes: cite the specific work of the persona's inspiration 
that your change reflects. For template changes: describe the output quality 
problem you observed that the change would fix. -->

## Have You Tested This?

<!-- Have you run a board meeting using your proposed changes? What did you 
observe? -->
